records.ety: [Pref. en- + throne: cf. OF. enthroner. Cf. Inthronize.]

defs: To seat on a throne; to exalt to the seat of royalty or of high authority; hence, to invest with sovereign authority or dignity.
quotes: Beneath a sculptured arch he sits enthroned.
It [mercy] is enthroned in the hearts of kings.

defs: To induct, as a bishop, into the powers and privileges of a vacant see.
